summary: Iteration 65 Testing - BD CRM New Features (3CX Calling, Notes, Reminders, Transaction History, Dashboard Visibility). Backend: 17/18 passed (1 skipped due to invalid CS head credentials). Frontend: All features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: CS Head credentials (falja@clt-academy.com / Falja@123) return 401 - credentials may be incorrect or user deactivated

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/students/{id}/notes creates call note with text, type, created_by_name, created_at
Backend: POST /api/students/{id}/notes with empty text returns 400
Backend: GET /api/students/{id}/notes returns notes list sorted by created_at desc
Backend: GET /api/students/{id}/transaction-history returns transactions with summary (total_deposits, total_withdrawals, net_value)
Backend: GET /api/students/{id}/transaction-history accessible by BD agent, Super Admin
Backend: GET /api/students/{invalid_id}/transaction-history returns 404
Backend: POST /api/students/{id}/reminder sets reminder with date, time, note, type
Backend: POST /api/students/{id}/reminder with invalid type returns 400
Backend: POST /api/students/{invalid_id}/reminder returns 404
Backend: GET /api/bd/dashboard returns revenue KPIs for Super Admin (period_revenue, all_time_revenue, agent_performance, recent_deposits)
Backend: GET /api/bd/dashboard returns basic metrics for BD agent (total_students, stage_counts)
Backend: POST /api/3cx/click-to-call logs call attempt
Backend: GET /api/3cx/call-history/{contact_id} returns call history
Backend: BD agent login returns role business_development
Backend: Super admin login returns role super_admin
Backend: Unauthenticated access returns 403
Frontend: BD CRM page loads with 522 students for BD agent
Frontend: BD CRM student detail modal shows ClickToCall button
Frontend: BD CRM student detail modal shows 3CX Call Center section with 'Connected' badge
Frontend: BD CRM student detail modal shows Follow-up Notes section with textarea
Frontend: BD CRM student detail modal shows Transaction History with Deposits/Withdrawals/Net Value summary
Frontend: BD CRM student detail modal shows Reminder button
Frontend: BD CRM student detail modal shows Record Redeposit button
Frontend: Adding a note via BD CRM modal saves successfully (toast: 'Note saved')
Frontend: Reminder modal opens with quick date buttons (Tomorrow, In 3 days, In 1 week), Date/Time inputs, Reminder Type dropdown
Frontend: BD Dashboard as BD agent shows only Total Students (522) and Closed Deals (1) - NO revenue KPIs
Frontend: BD Dashboard as Super Admin shows all 4 KPIs: Total Students (1044), Closed Deals (1), Period Revenue (AED 113,827.87), All-Time Revenue (AED 1,098,077.24)
Frontend: BD Dashboard as Super Admin shows Agent Performance table and Recent Redeposits table
Frontend: CS CRM has TransactionHistory component integrated (verified in code)
Frontend: Mentor CRM has TransactionHistory component integrated (verified in code)
action_items: Verify CS Head credentials (falja@clt-academy.com / Falja@123) - currently returning 401
critical_code_review_comments: BD CRM detail modal correctly implements all new features: 3CX ClickToCall, Call History, Follow-up Notes, Transaction History, Reminder, Record Redeposit
BD Dashboard visibility controls working correctly - revenue KPIs hidden from BD agents, visible to Super Admin only
TransactionHistory component properly integrated in BD CRM, CS CRM, and Mentor CRM detail modals
ReminderModal component supports quick date selection and reminder types (general, upgrade, redeposit)
ClickToCall component integrates with 3CX Web Client and tel: protocol
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_bd_crm_new_features.py - New test file for BD CRM new features (19 tests)
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing BD students (522 per agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BD CRM new features fully implemented and tested. Student notes stored in 'student_notes' collection. Transaction history aggregates from leads, cs_upgrades, mentor_redeposits, mentor_withdrawals, ltv_transactions. BD Dashboard visibility controls working - BD agents see only Total Students and Closed Deals, Super Admin sees all revenue KPIs, Agent Performance, and Recent Redeposits. CS Head credentials may need verification.
